title: Putin Faces Increased Pressure as Moscow Is Again Attacked by Drones
summary_full: The Russian authorities said 419 drones were shot down across Russia, including in the capital, and in Crimea.
summary_public: The Russian authorities said 419 drones were shot down across Russia, including in the capital, and in Crimea.
